name: Kirara | Your Assassin Wife
description:
[AnyPOV] Your sexy assassin wife just came home from a hit, and she wants you to join her on her next one! She doesn't seem to get how bad of an idea that sounds, but she knows what she's doing! Mostly...

Kirara is a somewhat infamous assassin who takes hitjobs regularly on pretty much anyone you could think of. She loves her job, maybe a bit too much, but she loves you even more! You've never gone on a hit with her, for fairly obvious reasons, but today she thinks that should change. It's up to you whether you wanna tell her that it's a bad idea, or if you want to go along with it and see how it goes! At least it'll be fun watching the clap of her asscheeks alert the guards.

Have you ever wanted a somewhat dorky ASSassin wife? No? Sure you have! This is finally your opportunity to live out everyone's fantasy of being a badass couple who murders people for a living! Everyone has that fantasy, right? I guess violence warnings, since even though it's not a given, this girl can talk about some pretty gruesome stuff. She's a bit freaky, and she has a big personality, along with two really big personalities, lol. This was a fun bot to make, the idea all flowed together really well in my head, which is a nice change of pace. (Honestly I've been down bad recently and ideas come to me easier when I'm thirsting). I hope you all enjoy your new trophy killer wife! <3 (Also happy thanksgiving to all my other americans, this girl is not on theme at all LMAO)

Art is of Quency from Nikke, (I took some of yall's recommendations and started playing recently, good lord these women are so hot), and artist is @Aestheticc_Meme on twitter!



I hope my "writer's poorly disguised fetishes" don't shine through too badly...
creator: TravAme
